decisions.reasoning: Flutter Mane outspeeds and 2HKOs Tornadus-Therian with Moonblast. Switching to Incineroar provides a safe pivot that resists Fairy-type moves and can threaten Flutter Mane with Knock Off or U-turn on the following turn.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane. Even though Incineroar is at low HP, securing the KO immediately is the priority to remove a major offensive threat.

Incineroar has fainted, so I must send in a replacement. Kingambit is the best choice to switch into Flutter Mane as it resists Moonblast and Shadow Ball, and can threaten a KO with Sucker Punch or Iron Head.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane. Since I can secure the KO this turn, I must attack immediately to remove the threat.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Tornadus-Therian, and since I have a clear path to KO, I must attack immediately to remove the threat.
Calyrex-Ice is at low HP and will be outsped and KO'd by Rillaboom's priority or standard moves, so I must use the guaranteed OHKO move now to remove the threat before Calyrex-Ice faints.

Calyrex-Ice has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Tornadus-Therian is the best choice to check Rillaboom due to its Flying-type resistance to Grass moves and ability to threaten with Hurricane.
Hurricane is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, and since I outspeed, I should take the KO immediately to remove the threat and gain momentum.
